name: djungle-agent-os
description: Connect Claude to the Djungle Agent OS. v4.4.0: user-aware auth — Personal API Key (aos_u_) valida su tutti i tuoi tenant, switch fluido in Cowork via /tenant switch (set_active_tenant MCP). v4.3.x: self multi-tenant + brand emoji + skill /tenant. v4.2.x: Librarian — briefing weekly con alert. v4.1.x: custom agents UI, marketplace, /sota-board. Backed da 73 MCP tool su agents-api.djungle.io.
